overall.description: First-person perspective from inside a futuristic vehicle driving through a rain-soaked cyberpunk city. Heavy neon lighting shifts from green to purple as the vehicle navigates narrow streets lined with holographic billboards and towering glass buildings, with no other traffic present.

segments.scene_description: The vehicle navigates a narrow enclosed street with green-tinted glass towers on the left and gray concrete buildings on the right. Yellow neon overhead structures illuminate the rain-soaked road while the dashboard displays glow green.

segments.scene_description: The lighting shifts dramatically to purple and pink as the vehicle enters a wider commercial district. Digital billboards line the right side of the street while the rain continues to fall steadily.

segments.scene_description: A massive pink holographic billboard dominates the left side as the vehicle approaches a more open intersection. The white monolith of a distant building becomes visible through the hazy rain.

segments.scene_description: Returning to the forward view, the vehicle now travels through a more open area with expansive overcast skies visible above. The dense urban canyon gives way to a broader horizon with distant buildings barely visible through the rain and haze.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person perspective through a rain-soaked cyberpunk city that transforms from a narrow, green-tinted corridor into a wide, hazy urban expanse. It begins by navigating a tight street flanked by green glass towers and gray concrete, where yellow neon structures cast a glow over the wet road and green dashboard displays. As the vehicle enters a wider commercial district, the lighting shifts dramatically to purple and pink hues while digital billboards emerge along the right side of the street. The scene then opens further at an intersection dominated by a massive pink holographic billboard and a distant white monolith, before the camera pans right to capture a blur of purple neon and rain-streaked glass passing the side window. Finally, the view returns forward as the dense urban canyon gives way to a broader horizon under expansive overcast skies, with distant buildings fading into the rain and haze.
